archetypes.name: wastewater evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: wastewater signal changes while operators context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: operators boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: operators handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: reason regression harness
archetypes.trigger: reason behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: biological operator packet
archetypes.trigger: biological output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
